items.html: The reason they must rise up is that these vessels of Akudim are the first vessels that were emanated. No vessels were emanated above them since the light there is enormous, and the vessels cannot exist there. Hence, if the upper light had been extended downward to their place while they are inside their vessels, the vessels would have been revoked. This is why it was necessary that only the lights of ZON in the vessel of Keter would rise up.
